summary: Iteration 37: Comprehensive testing of Gallery Categories CRUD, Gallery lightbox redesign, Visual Builder new blocks (Blog/News, Reading List), and Footer sitemap. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GalleryPage.js: Dynamic category tabs from gallery_categories collection working (All, Business, Marketing, Solution)
GalleryPage.js: Lightbox with dark background (bg-black/95), arrow navigation, title/summary, counter - all working
GalleryPage.js: Keyboard navigation (Escape, Arrow keys) working correctly
GalleryManager.js: Categories CRUD dialog with edit/delete buttons for each category
GalleryManager.js: Photo edit dialog shows dynamic categories dropdown from gallery_categories
GalleryManager.js: 'Open link in new tab' toggle appears when link is entered
BlockRenderer.js: BlogPostsBlock and ReadingListBlock components implemented
layoutDefinitions.js: blog_posts and reading_list block types defined with correct labels
SortableBlock.js: Newspaper and BookOpen icons for blog_posts and reading_list blocks
Footer.js: Site Map section shows dynamic CMS pages with show_in_footer=true in two columns
Footer.js: No hardcoded links - all pages come from nav_pages collection sorted by order
api.js: Gallery categories API methods (getGalleryCategories, createGalleryCategory, etc.) implemented
seed_data_creation: 3 gallery categories seeded: Business (order 1), Marketing (order 2), Solution (order 3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 37 features verified: (1) Gallery Categories CRUD - admin can create/edit/delete categories via Categories dialog, (2) Gallery page redesign - dynamic tabs filter photos, lightbox with dark bg/arrows/title/summary/counter, keyboard nav works, (3) Visual Builder - Blog/News and Reading List blocks available in block picker, (4) Footer sitemap - shows 19 dynamic CMS pages in two columns from nav_pages with show_in_footer=true. Existing gallery photos use 'professional' and 'personal' categories from before CRUD system.

gallery_categories_public_api.details: GET /api/public/gallery-categories returns categories sorted by order

admin_gallery_categories_dialog.details: Categories button opens dialog showing Business, Marketing, Solution with edit/delete buttons

admin_gallery_category_dropdown.details: Photo edit dialog shows dynamic categories dropdown from gallery_categories collection

admin_gallery_open_in_new_tab.details: Open link in new tab toggle appears when link is entered in photo edit dialog

gallery_page_dynamic_tabs.details: Gallery page shows All, Business, Marketing, Solution tabs from gallery_categories

gallery_page_tab_filtering.details: Clicking tabs filters gallery photos by category

gallery_page_title_category_overlay.details: Each photo shows title and category as overlay text at bottom

gallery_lightbox_fullscreen.details: Clicking photo opens fullscreen lightbox with dark background (bg-black/95)

gallery_lightbox_content.details: Lightbox shows image, title, summary, and counter (1/6)

gallery_lightbox_navigation.details: Left/right arrow buttons and keyboard support (Escape, Arrow keys) working

visual_builder_blog_posts_block.details: Blog / News block type available in block picker - auto-displays latest blog posts

visual_builder_reading_list_block.details: Reading List block type available in block picker - auto-displays books collection

visual_builder_gallery_block.details: Gallery block with category tabs available in block picker

footer_sitemap_dynamic.details: Site Map section shows 19 dynamic CMS pages with show_in_footer=true

footer_sitemap_two_columns.details: Footer sitemap displays pages in two columns sorted by order

footer_no_hardcoded_links.details: No hardcoded Home/News/Gallery/Reading List links - all from CMS
